# williswee.com

> A personal website and portfolio showcasing projects, readings, and guides.

## Main
- [Home](https://williswee.com/index.html): Introduction and overview of the site.
- [Work](https://williswee.com/work.html): A showcase of Willis's professional milestones and projects.
- [Books](https://williswee.com/books.html): A curated list of books I have read and recommend.
- [Guide](https://williswee.com/guide.html): A collection of guides and tutorials on various topics.

## Thoughts
Articles and reflections by Willis Wee.
- [One month into the break](https://williswee.com/thoughts/onemonth): Reflections on life, learning, and building side projects one month after leaving Tech in Asia.
- [Thank you and goodbye, Tech in Asia](https://williswee.com/thoughts/goodbye): After 16 years of building Tech in Asia, Willis reflects on his journey and steps down as CEO.
